hooks.prompt:
Review the code change for PWA issues. Check for:
1. Service worker not registering — missing navigator.serviceWorker.register() in main entry or wrong scope
2. Cache-first without network fallback — stale content forever if cache-first has no revalidation strategy
3. Caching everything — service worker cache grows unbounded without max entries or expiration
4. Missing offline fallback page — no response for navigation requests when offline
5. Service worker using import statements — must use importScripts() or be bundled (no ES modules in SW)
6. Not handling SW update lifecycle — missing 'waiting' state handling, no skip-waiting prompt
7. Web manifest missing required fields — needs name, short_name, icons (192+512), start_url, display
8. Push notification without permission check — must check Notification.permission before subscribing
9. No cache versioning — old caches not cleaned up in activate event
10. Background sync without retry limit — failing sync retries forever, draining battery

Respond {"ok": true} if no issues found, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue description"} if problems detected.
